briefdescription.para: Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 0 register.
Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 1 register.
0x06 PPK HAsh is all zero hence inavalid
0x0E Only RSA and ECDSA are supported
0x10 Revocation ID is out of range
0x14 Invalid key source selected for decryption
0x16 Size mismatch for data remaining for decryption
0x1B RSA ENC 0xbc value is not matched
0x1C RSA PSS verification hash is not matched
0x1D Keysrc should be efuse black key for enc only
0x1E PUFHD location should be from eFuse for enc only
0x1F eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x20 eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x21 Metahdr IV Range not matched with eFuse IV
0x22 Metahdr DpaCm & eFuse DpaCm values are not matched
0x29 Error encrypted data is not 128 bit aligned
0x31 Error when RED key clear failed
0x32 Error when ECC curve is not supported and trying to access
0x33 Error when partition hash is not present for respective partition
0x34 Error when partition hash comparison is failed
0x06 PPK HAsh is all zero hence inavalid
0x0E Only RSA and ECDSA are supported
0x10 Revocation ID is out of range
0x14 Invalid key source selected for decryption
0x16 Size mismatch for data remaining for decryption
0x1B RSA ENC 0xbc value is not matched
0x1C RSA PSS verification hash is not matched
0x1D Keysrc should be efuse black key for enc only
0x1E PUFHD location should be from eFuse for enc only
0x1F eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x20 eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x21 Metahdr IV Range not matched with eFuse IV
0x22 Metahdr DpaCm & eFuse DpaCm values are not matched
0x29 Error encrypted data is not 128 bit aligned
0x31 Error when RED key clear failed
0x32 Error when secure state config measurement failed
0x2C Error when ECC curve is not supported and trying to access
0x34 Error when partition hash is not present for respective partition
0x35 Error when partition hash comparison is failed
0x37 - Error in LMS sign verification due to error in SHA operation
0x38 - Error in LMS sign verification due to invalid public key size

0x2B Error when RED key clear failed
0x2C Error when ECC curve is not supported and trying to access
0x2D Error when partition hash is not present for respective partition
0x2E Error when partition hash comparison is failed
0x30 - Error in LMS sign verification due to error in SHA operation
0x31 - Error in LMS sign verification due to invalid public key size
0x06 PPK HAsh is all zero hence inavalid

0x14 Invalid key source selected for decryption

0x31 Error when RED key clear failed

This function updates KEK red key availability status from boot header.
This function provides Obfuscated Aes Key source.

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi.
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function is supported only for Versalnet, nothing to be done in Versal.
This function checks the JTAG device state change.

para.verbatim: When Secure gate is opened from close state this API raises an error, if the gate is closed and re-opened again this function recognizes the state change and performs the action configured.

parameterdescription.para: is of pointer of void type.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function runs the KAT for RSA.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
is pointer in which output of this function will be stored.
is pointer which holds the input data for which mask should be calculated which should be 48 bytes length.

listitem.para: XLOADER_SEC_BUF_CLEAR_ERR if failed to clear buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
is pointer in which output of this function will be stored.
is pointer which holds the input data for which mask should be calculated which should be 48 bytes length.
